title: GHU New Battery 40 WH 454668-001 436426-311 436426-351 HSTNN-CB45 HSTNN-OB45 Compatible with HP EliteBook 2730p 2740P 2760P 2710p 2710 Tablet PC AH547AA 436426-751 436426-752 HSTNN-W47C
features: Extensive Compatibility: Ideal for HP EliteBook models including the 2710p, 2730p, 2740p, 2760p, and 2710 Tablet series, as well as AH547AA, 436426-751, 436426-752, and HSTNN-W47C. This replacement battery matches well with part numbers 454668-001, 436426-311, 436426-351, 436426-751, and 436426-752, 586596-141, and 593592-001, ensuring a proper fit for your device.

Premium Performance: Enhance your laptop with our high-quality battery designed for the HP EliteBook 2740p, 2760p, and more. Offers reliable performance and durability that complements OEM batteries for HP EliteBook 2760p and 2730p models.

Long-Lasting Power: Extend your HP EliteBook's usage with our battery, suitable for the HP 2700 Ultra-Slim and other models. Ideal for replacing HP EliteBook 2760p battery OT06 or the 756743-001 HP battery, helping you maintain power during extensive use.

Effortless Installation: Easily install this battery to rejuvenate your HP EliteBook 2730p, 2740p i5 laptop, or any 2760p model. Designed for a straightforward replacement, matching the fit and finish of original EliteBook batteries.

Quality Focus: Our HP EliteBook 2740p battery is produced to meet high standards. It's a reliable option for replacing the 2730p HP battery or the HP EliteBook 2740p laptop battery, providing enhanced performance for your laptop.
description: Product Description Model:GHU-HP-2710P Voltage: 11.1V Capacity: 40Wh Battery Type: Polymer Compatible Part Number: 454668-001 436426-311 436426-351 HSTNN-CB45 HSTNN-OB45 Fit Machine Models: EliteBook 2730p 2740P 2760P 2710p 2710 Tablet PC AH547AA 436426-751 436426-752 HSTNN-W47C Value High quality material and IC ensure durability and performance. Up to 500 charge and Discharge cycles High quality battery cells ensure longer charge cycles. ENHANCED IC Built in smart control chip conveniently offers Quicker charging, lower power consumption and longer discharge time. Built To Perform We’ve incorporated Grade A battery cells to ensure longer battery life and durability Secure Packaging Our batteries come in a sturdy cardboard & an anti-static bag wrapped in synthetic foam, to ensure your replaceable battery arrives safely
